svg.title: Recovery Team RAG architecture
svg.desc: Layered architecture: Streamlit UI calls the orchestrator, which routes questions to PT and Trainer specialist agents backed by per-agent Chroma collections, then synthesizes a team answer.

g.text: Merges drafts, attributes advice, appends disclaimer

svg.text: Both subclass SpecialistAgent (base.py) · consult() never raises

g.text: Shared RAG core (rag_core.py) — local MiniLM embeddings

svg.text: One ./chroma_db dir · one collection per agent (siloed knowledge)
Ingest: data/pt/ and data/trainer/ → chunk 1000/150 → embed → persist
